title: CIPSE RDS Analysis
text:
This document summarizes the reconciliation between coupon codes in the tracking form and the main survey dataset for the Eldoret RDS study.


Code
source(here::here("R", "setup.R"))
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))

results <- run_rds_audit(params$site)

title: Mombasa
text:
source("R/setup.R")

Loading required package: pacman


Warning: package 'pacman' was built under R version 4.5.3

source("R/functions.R")

run_rds_audit("Mombasa")

Running RDS audit for: Mombasa


Audit complete for: Mombasa


$summary
# A tibble: 8 × 2
  metric                       value
  <chr>                        <int>
1 Total CTF coupons              421
2 Total Survey Records           417
3 Orphan Coupons (CTF)           211
4 Clean CTF Coupons              413
5 Valid Coupon Matches           378
6 Invalid Survey Coupons          28
7 Unused Issued Coupons           35
8 Orphan-linked Survey Records     0

$duplicates

   coupon       n
   <chr>    <int>

title: CIPSE RDS Analysis
text:
This website provides analysis and audit results for the CIPSE RDS (Respondent-Driven Sampling) study across multiple sites: Nairobi, Eldoret, Kisumu, and Mombasa.



Dashboard: Interactive summary of audit results across all sites.
Site Reports: Detailed reports for each individual site.
